mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_borrow(book_code, username, status) VALUES(#{bookCode}, #{username}, 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE t_borrow SET status = 2, return_time = NOW() WHERE book_code = #{bookCode} AND username = #{username} AND status = 1
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_borrow WHERE username = #{username} AND status = 1
SELECT * FROM t_borrow WHERE book_code = #{bookCode} AND username = #{username} AND status = 1
